{{Quote|Access to this site restricted to authorized personnel only. All others are to be destroyed on sight.|Xucphra security droid|<ref name="sw36">[[Star Wars (1998) 36|''Star Wars'' (1998) 36]]</ref>}}
A '''mission to Thyferra''' was carried out during the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]] by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]. As a [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] delegation prepared to leave for [[Troiken/Legends|Troiken]] to negotiate with the [[Stark Commercial Combine]], Jedi Master [[Tyvokka/Legends|Tyvokka]] suspected that the [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] shortage which had allowed the Combine to come to power had been contrived. With the agreement of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]], the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] agreed to send a fact-finding mission to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]], source of bacta.

When the Jedi arrived, they found the destroyed [[Xucphra Corporation]] bacta refinery—whose explosion had triggered the bacta shortage—was surrounded by [[HKB-3 hunter-killer droid|security droids]] programmed to kill any interlopers. Destroying the [[Droid/Legends|droids]], the two encountered a secret meeting between Xucphra's leader, [[Adol Bel]], and the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] leader, [[Hask]], whose conversation confirmed that the two organizations had indeed manufactured the shortage to boost the bacta revenue. However, the plan had backfired, for the Combine's [[Navcomputer virus|navicomputer virus]] was disabling all interstellar commerce, and the Combine was seizing bacta shipments for use in the war on [[Troiken/Legends|Troiken]].

Knowing that Jedi were on the scene, Bel released [[HKB-3 hunter-killer droid]]s, which the Jedi evaded thanks to the use of a [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] and entry into a sewer, whose [[Tunnel-grinder|tunnel grinder]] aided them. Making their way to the nearest [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], Tholme and Vos sneaked onto a Federation bacta freighter. The ship was captured by the Combine and rerouted to Troiken where, in an attempt to deny such an advantage to their enemy, the Jedi caused the freighter to explode.
